purpose: Navigation and cross-reference documents enabling agent traversal of the research graph. Not instructional content — structural metadata only.

terminal_objective.prerequisite: None — entry point for all agent traversal
terminal_objective.concept: Provides a complete, domain-organized listing of all research nodes with file paths, key questions answered, and primary relationships.
terminal_objective.practical_application: Use as the first document retrieved when an agent receives a curriculum design request — provides the node graph needed to select the relevant research files.
terminal_objective.market_value: Internal — not a learner-facing artifact; enables agent efficiency.

terminal_objective.concept: Defines all directed inbound/outbound relationships between nodes; includes relationship density table identifying most central nodes.
terminal_objective.practical_application: Use to determine prerequisite chains for any given competency; traverse the graph to construct a learning sequence for a target skill.
terminal_objective.market_value: Internal — prerequisite graph enables automated learning path generation.
